content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1589: Principle of Power Upanishads

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Ni Cang Tian

It was a dark gray vacuum area. There was no source of light, life, movement of air, or anything. There was nothing.

Shi Yan, Zi Yao, and the others had come to such a world.

After getting through the Absolute Beginning Gateway, people landed in this area. There was no way back, either. All they could see was nothing and it was silent. Their Soul Consciousness couldn’t reach any life. Everything was so cold and silent.

“Is it the place that every creature wants to visit even in their dreams?” Mei Ji was puzzled and watching around. It seemed like she couldn’t accept this. “There’s nothing here...”

“Yeah, nothing is here. So strange.” Judy flew around and checked. When she came back, she shook her head in surprise. “Is something wrong? Perhaps the Absolute Beginning Gateway has delivered us to another region?”

People didn’t know whether to laugh or cry.

Shi Yan looked pensive as he was using his Soul Consciousness to explore further. He didn’t answer them.

Zi Yao was skeptical. She looked around but she didn’t have a clue. Listening to the others, she suddenly intervened, “Then what did you think is hidden behind the Absolute Beginning Gateway? What will you find there?

Everyone was silent.

After a while, Forefather Dragon Lizard talked softly, “I thought that there would be something that can help me transform into a real Absolute Beginning creature behind the Absolute Beginning Gateway. It could help me reach my ancestor’s shape that year through his blood in my body.”

“I thought that it would have the true secret of Time...” Montecie’s childish voice arose.

“I thought I could find something to advance the Territory Ancestor Realm further. It’s what rumors are all about. It’s to get the ultimate realm after entering the Absolute Beginning Gateway, isn’t it?” Han Tian said in a low voice. He asked the others, but it felt like he was asking himself.

What Dragon Lizard, Montecie, and Han Tian said were dreams that they had treasured in their heart and the final goals they wanted to reach. They had placed their biggest hope on the Absolute Beginning Gateway and dreamed of achieving their goal through the Absolute Beginning Gateway.

“Too bad that there’s nothing here,” Mei Ji sounded upset.

“What do you want?” Zi Yao asked with a faint smile.

“I don’t know...” Mei Ji unconsciously turned to Shi Yan who was absorbed in his thoughts and whined inwardly, I’m here because I wanted to follow him. I want to experience things with him...

Hiro, Emperor Sea Shark, and Judy were also disappointed. They hovered in the empty space and didn’t know what to do.

“He will give you the answers,” Zi Yao smiled.

Everybody turned to look at Shi Yan. Until now, they finally realized that Shi Yan didn’t answer or join in their conversation. As the owner of the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, the key to opening the Absolute Beginning Gateway, only he could know the mysteries of this place to solve their doubts.

Focusing on him, people saw the soul energy fluctuate from him continuously. He frowned and looked pensive. Their eyes then brightened as they hoped that Shi Yan could give them an answer.

Shi Yan’s Soul Consciousness was gliding fast away.

Just like a column of invisible electricity, his soul zoomed forward to explore the empty space. He relaxed and didn’t mind the surroundings, his soul quiet and clear.

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was like a lighthouse that covered his co-soul and shone some bright but mysterious light

That light had helped him attack Zhen Ru and shoo her away. That light was magical light that the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower told him was the light shot from Absolute Beginning’s eyes when they opened.

After it opened the Absolute Beginning Gateway, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower changed. So many Absolute Beginning symbols on it disappeared. At this moment, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was crystal and fulgent, which looked both marvelous and imposing. It flew above Shi Yan’s co-soul. A series of memories in his soul were gathering under the light.

He knew that the co-soul had Desolate’s memory. However, as they were just two-fifths of it, those pieces of scattered memories were unreadable to him. However, at this moment, those pieces of memories began to emerge clearly as if they were stimulated somehow.

Perhaps even Desolate couldn’t understand them as they had existed only in the true mark of the most powerful creature. They were the traces and marks that would never be erased...

A strange connection that couldn’t be described arose from his tier of power Upanishad, or from the Life Original Symbol, to be exact!

The crystal ball of Life power Upanishad had an Original Symbol refined by the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, which recorded the immense and profound powers of Life. At this moment, the Life Original Symbol was throbbing vigorously like a heart; it shook the entire crystal ball.

A string of life that reached to an extremely far away was released from the Life Ball. With Shi Yan’s Soul Consciousness, it flew in a precise direction!

Boom!

An explosion echoed in his head as a wisp of his Soul Consciousness shot into a milky white sea.

Extremely thick Life aura permeated from that sea! Life, energy fluctuations, heartbeat, the birth of souls, the creation of creatures, and the growth of trees... All magical energy fluctuations of Life power Upanishad rolled torrentially from that milky sea.

That sea seemed to be the source of Life. It was the life sea that represented all ultimate secrets of Life power Upanishad as it carried the principle of Life power Upanishad. This sea was the origin of all Life power Upanishads!

The Original Symbol in his crystal ball belonged to that sea and was a part of that sea. Each drop in that sea was a representative of a branch of Life power Upanishad...

As soon as this thought popped up, Shi Yan was dumbstruck. His empty soul became turbulent.

Billions of Soul Consciousness wisps returned. Because of his chaotic mind, they turned into invisible lights and entered his soul pond in his Sea of Consciousness, waking him up.

The wisp of Soul Consciousness that had explored the milky sea was the last wisp. The wonderful feeling he couldn’t describe vanished shortly after.

As people were watching him, Shi Yan shivered hard. They all knew that Shi Yan had just retrieved his Soul Consciousness.

Opened his eyes, Shi Yan was terrified. He couldn’t help but take a deep breath. Divine lights shot like electric beams in his eyes as he shouted, “What’s that?!?”

“What?!?” the others screamed instinctively.

Including Zi Yao.

“You... What did you get?” Zi Yao pulled herself together first. Trying to subside the curiosity churning in her heart, she asked in her calmest voice, “What happened? What struck you? Did your Soul Consciousness see something that shook you hard? What’s that?”

“A sea, a milky sea. It’s not really big and it’s too far away from here. That sea seems to resonate with my Life Original Symbol. That sea contains all supernatural abilities of Life power Upanishad. My Original Symbol is just a drop of that sea, a tiny part of it...”

Shi Yan tried to describe but he sounded like he was sleep-talking. “I don’t know how to describe it precisely. I felt that the sea was the fountainhead of all Life power Upanishads in this world. Every principle, understandings, and studies about the Life power Upanishads have originated from that sea.

Everybody listened to him, their faces perplexed. They didn’t know what he was trying to tell them; they had no idea what milky sea he was talking about.

Only Zi Yao had light danced crazily in her eyes, her graceful body quivering. It seemed like she knew something.

After a while, as people were still baffled, Zi Yao stopped shaking and the strange light in her eyes vanished. Her lips trembled as she tried to say calmly, “If your feeling isn’t wrong, it’s the Life Sea, the Power Upanishad Origin, the fountainhead of all Life power Upanishads!”

“Power Upanishad Origin?” Han Tian rubbed his disheveled bird-nest-like hair. He winced and cried, “I think I heard about this. Someone told me about the Upanishad Origin... Damn it. What is it? What does it mean?”

“Power Upanishad Origin!” Montecie suddenly screamed hoarsely. She choked on her own breath, her little face filled with deep fear. “Is it... Is it the Power Upanishad Origin? The legendary Power Upanishad Origin? Gosh, such things exist!”

“What is it after all?” Han Tian hollered.

“The Power Upanishad Origin has many different names. For example, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower’s Ultimate Principle, Power Upanishad Symbol Tower’s Principle, Scared Principle, and more. It’s the final form of power Upanishads and also the origin of the power Upanishads. The Power Upanishad Origin keeps all changes and mysterious powers of a particular power Upanishad. If all the Absolute Beginning creatures were created by Absolute Beginning and if Absolute Beginning exists, the Power Upanishad Origin will be the power Upanishads in Absolute Beginning’s tier of power Upanishads...”

Zi Yao looked at the others; her face had never been so furious. “Fusing a Power Upanishad Origin is to control the natural principle of that power and to understand every change and supernatural abilities of that power Upanishad. You will become the sole, supreme God of that power Upanishad!”

Hearing him, everybody was dumbstruck. They kept silent and thought about Zi Yao’s words.

Shortly after, everyone’s eyes brightened as they were so excited. They eyed Zi Yao and Shi Yan, waiting for their final confirmation.

“I know you want an answer. Yeah, if Absolute Beginning did exist, I think we’re in its head. And now, we are in its tier of power Upanishad. This place has the Power Upanishad Origin of all power Upanishads. It’s the root of principle and the most magical thing in this world. If you can find the principle of your power Upanishads here and get the Power Upanishad Origin, you will become the sole God of that particular power Upanishads. You will get the supernatural abilities that no one could imagine!” confirmed Shi Yan.

Everybody cheered up boisterously.

“All Power Upanishad Origins are here, but you have to find them yourself,” added Zi Yao. “You have to find them with your own power Upanishad. We got here before the others; it means that we have the advantage. We must hurry to find the Power Upanishad Origins and fuse with them. Otherwise, when Sauron, Devour, and Yuan Zu come, the fierce battle will start. Guys... We have to go with the flow.”

“Guys, go and get your Power Upanishad Origin!” Shi Yan grinned.

Then, he nodded to them and turned into a jet of light heading in the direction he had just figured out.

He got the target first! That Life Sea was the Power Upanishad Origin of the Life power Upanishad. As long as he had that Power Upanishad Origin, his Life power Upanishad was going to reach the ultimate level, the most magical and final realm the warrior cultivating Life power Upanishad could reach!
